message:
chore: add .beads.recovery_*/ pattern to .gitignore

Cover timestamped beads recovery directories (e.g.
.beads.recovery_20260415T050111Z/) that use a dot separator instead
of an underscore, which the existing .beads_recovery_*/ pattern misses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -278,3 +278,6 @@ evidence/
 
 # Heaptrack profiling dumps
 heaptrack.*.zst
+
+# Beads recovery artifacts (timestamped directories at repo root)
+.beads.recovery_*/
